name: broker-correction-existing-thread
rationale: Broker reply to existing deal thread containing a field correction. F3.BR intake classification routes to broker-correction handler; thread is reconstructed via MessageID continuity; correction is integrated into canonical_map via R10-G push. Tests the broker-correction routing branch independently of discrepancy magnitude (unlike B01 which tests F2.DH gate; C02 isolates F3.BR routing).
notes: Two-event sequence — intake then correction. Correction is a routine field update (broker provides additional context); no discrepancy with docs.
